name: sweep_arch_tilt_v2_10
_doc: Sweep arch tilt from -20° (rightward tilt) to +20° (leftward tilt) in 10 linear steps. Rotates the arch+descending segments around the inlet z-axis — gives clean 3D variability without invoking the Fourier non-planar (δ_3, δ_4). Real aortic arches typically tilt 5-15° leftward in chest CT.
